title: Pulse Surveys Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Pulse Surveys skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

defined_measurement_dimensions.description: Defined measurement dimensions aligned to organizational priorities: engagement, well-being, manager effectiveness, belonging, role clarity, or others

survey_instrument_510.description: Survey instrument of 5–10 questions maximum using a consistent Likert scale (typically 1–5 or 1–10) enabling trend comparison across time periods

sampling_approach_frequency.description: Sampling approach and frequency decision: full population monthly, rotating sample weekly, or triggered post-event pulse for specific cohorts

anonymity_architecture_confirmed.description: Anonymity architecture with confirmed minimum reporting threshold (5 responses per manager before manager-level data is surfaced)

benchmark_data_prior.description: Benchmark data from prior annual engagement surveys to provide a baseline for trend comparison

external_benchmark_norms.description: External benchmark norms from the survey platform provider's industry database

segmentation_variables_manager.description: Segmentation variables: manager, team, level, location, function, and tenure to enable targeted analysis of high-risk sub-populations
